content: Benefits of Using Personal Loan EMI Calculator ICICI Bank What are the benefits of using a Personal Loan EMI Calculator? What is the minimum salary requirement for a Rs 20 lakh Personal Loan? Can I use the Personal Loan EMI Calculator to check different loan amounts? Personal Loan EMI calculator helps you to calculate monthly EMI amount & interest payable. Use ICICI Bank’s Personal Loan Calculator to know your EMI.
features: Quick results: It provides a quick EMI amount, helping you avoid manual calculation errors.
Time-saving: You can check your Monthly EMI and the total payable amount in seconds without complex formulas or long calculations.
User-friendly: The calculator is easy to use and can be accessed anytime on your phone or computer by entering just a few details.
Easy comparison: You can compare EMIs from different lenders to choose an affordable Personal Loan option.
Better financial planning: You can adjust the tenure and amount to find an option that suits your requirements for effective financial planning.
Wide range of loan amounts and tenures: Apply for a Personal Loan for any amount between ₹50,000 to ₹50,00,000 and select a tenure (i.e. repayment period) between 12 months and 72 months.
Quickonline application through the ICICI Bank website or ICICI Bank's iMobile app, with minimal documents.
After approval, the sanctioned amount is deposited directly into your savings account so that you can use the funds quickly, as required.
Get options to prepay your loan without extra charges and thus, manage your repayment as per your convenience.
It helps in making informed decisions.
